{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the information provided, DNA repair, RNA editing, and transcription can occur in both directions depending on the context. However, DNA replication always occurs in a 5' to 3' direction. This is a fundamental principle of DNA replication where the DNA polymerase enzyme adds nucleotides to the 3' end of the growing strand, using the 5' end of the template strand as a reference.", "answer_choice": "B"}
